options.query:
index=wineventlog EventCode=1 Image!="C:\\Program Files\\SplunkUniversalForwarder\\*"
| stats count by ParentImage, Image
| sort -count
| head 10

index=wineventlog EventCode=1 Image!="C:\\Program Files\\SplunkUniversalForwarder\\*"
| eval technique=case(
    (like(Image,"%powershell.exe") OR like(Image,"%pwsh.exe"))
        AND (
            match(CommandLine,"(?i)-enc(odedcommand)?")
            OR match(CommandLine,"(?i)[A-Za-z0-9+/]{20,}={0,2}")
        ),
        "T1059.001",
    (
        like(CommandLine, "%lsass%") AND (
            like(CommandLine, "%procdump%") OR
            like(CommandLine, "%comsvcs.dll%") OR
            like(CommandLine, "%.dmp%") OR
            like(CommandLine, "%minidump%")
        )
        OR match(CommandLine, "(?i)mimikatz")
        OR match(CommandLine, "(?i)sekurlsa")
    ),
        "T1003.001",
    (like(CommandLine,"%telnet%") OR like(Image,"%\\telnet.exe")),
        "T1071",
    (
        (like(Image,"%\\schtasks.exe") AND (
            like(CommandLine,"% /create%") OR
            like(CommandLine,"% /change%") OR
            like(CommandLine,"% /run%") OR
            like(CommandLine,"% /delete%")
        ))
        OR match(CommandLine,"(?i)Register-ScheduledTask")
        OR match(CommandLine,"(?i)New-ScheduledTask")
        OR match(CommandLine,"(?i)Set-ScheduledTask")
        OR (like(CommandLine,"%.xml") AND like(CommandLine,"%schtasks%"))
    ),
        "T1053.005"
)
| stats count by technique

index=wineventlog EventCode=1 Image!="C:\\Program Files\\SplunkUniversalForwarder\\*"
| where (like(Image,"%powershell.exe") OR like(Image,"%pwsh.exe"))
    AND (
        match(CommandLine,"(?i)-enc(odedcommand)?")
        OR match(CommandLine,"(?i)[A-Za-z0-9+/]{20,}={0,2}")
    )
| table _time ComputerName User Image ParentImage CommandLine

index=wineventlog EventCode=1 
Image!="C:\\Program Files\\SplunkUniversalForwarder\\*" 
| stats count by Image 
| sort -count 
| head 10
